mechanism_narrative: Declines in the federal funds rate lower corporate discount rates and borrowing costs, which directly increases present values of future equity cash flows and drives positive forward returns.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.02 over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: When the unemployment rate exceeds 6.5 percent, labor market slack suppresses wage growth and consumer spending, which reduces corporate earnings expectations and produces negative forward returns.
failure_condition: Positive 20-day forward returns occur in more than 55 percent of triggered months.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous month-over-month expansion in retail sales and housing starts signals robust consumer demand and credit availability, which generates positive equity returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Joint positive growth in both series fails to produce positive returns in more than 60 percent of cases.

mechanism_narrative: A month-over-month decline in industrial production indicates immediate supply-side contraction, which triggers short-term risk-off positioning and negative five-day equity returns.
failure_condition: Five-day forward returns are non-negative in more than 50 percent of declining industrial production months.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating consumer price inflation above three percent year-over-year forces markets to price in aggressive central bank tightening, which compresses equity multiples and drives negative forward returns.
failure_condition: Returns remain positive in more than 65 percent of high-inflation months.

mechanism_narrative: Rising total nonfarm payrolls directly increases aggregate household income and corporate revenue expectations, which produces positive equity returns over a quarterly horizon.
failure_condition: Rank IC falls below 0.01 over rolling five-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: Divergence between slowing quarterly GDP growth and accelerating monthly retail sales indicates a shift toward consumer-driven demand, which supports equity valuations in the short term.
failure_condition: Signal produces negative returns in more than 55 percent of observed quarters.

mechanism_narrative: A sustained drop in industrial production below ninety-five signals severe manufacturing weakness, which prompts portfolio de-risking and negative forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Positive returns occur in more than 50 percent of triggered months.
